text: This subchapter does not apply to an aircraft owned by and used exclusively in the service of the federal or state government.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 24. Operation of Aircraft
##### § 24.002 — Application

This subchapter does not apply to an aircraft owned by and used exclusively in the service of the federal or state government.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This subchapter does not apply to an aircraft owned by and used exclusively in the service of the federal or state government.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
